metadata.name: AstrBot KB External Access
metadata.desc: Provides Agent-facing tools for listing, uploading to, and creating knowledge bases with whitelist/blacklist access control.

config.kb_access_control.mode.hint: whitelist: only allow KBs in the whitelist; blacklist: block KBs in the blacklist
config.kb_access_control.whitelist.hint: Agent is only allowed to access these KBs. In whitelist mode, an empty list means no KBs are accessible.
config.kb_access_control.blacklist.hint: Agent is blocked from accessing these KBs. Blacklist takes priority over whitelist.
config.kb_access_control.auto_whitelist_created: Whether newly created KBs are automatically added to the whitelist. Only effective in whitelist mode.
